implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Integrated single-agent objective for ATM: Each transaction must be recorded, and the client must have the ability to review all transactions performed against a given account R...
The system shall satisfy: Each transaction must be recorded, and the client must have the ability to review all transactions performed against a given account
The system shall satisfy: Recorded transactions must include the date, time, transaction type, amount and account balance after the transaction
The system shall satisfy: A bank client can have two types of accounts
The system shall satisfy: A checking-account and a saving-account
The system shall satisfy: For each checking account, one related saving-account can exists
The system shall satisfy: The application must verify that a client can gain access to his or her account by identification via a personal identification number (PIN) code
